title: corchorus pachyphyllus
intro: Corchorus pachyphyllus, also known as the jute mallow or Corchorus mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Corchorus pachyphyllus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and protect against oxidative stress. Corchorus pachyphyllus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or infusion, and its leaves, flowers, and roots can be used to make different herbal preparations.
